title: senecio pascuiandinus
intro: Senecio pascuiandinus, also known as Andean groundsel, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family that is native to the Andean region of South America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to act as a diuretic, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic. The health benefits of Senecio pascuiandinus include its potential to help with digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, including those mentioned above.
